decisions.title_en: EU orders Google to open Android and share search data with AI rivals
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Binding DMA decision issued 2026-07-16 (5 days ago, within limit). Major regulatory action.

decisions.title_en: Alibaba previews Qwen3.8-Max, 2.4T-param multimodal model, 'second only to Fable 5'
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Previewed 2026-07-19 at WAIC. Distinct from Kimi K3 (separate model).

decisions.title_en: Moonshot pauses new Kimi K3 subscriptions as demand overwhelms GPU capacity
decisions.reason: Published 2026-07-16 (K3 release / leaderboard win). New development on 07-20: 48-hour demand surge forced Moonshot to halt new sign-ups (existing users unaffected), tied to funding/HK-listing push.

decisions.title_en: SAP completes Prior Labs acquisition, commits €1B+ over four years to tabular AI lab
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Deal closed 2026-07-17 (4 days ago).

decisions.title_en: Nonprofit Current AI passes $400M committed to build free public-interest AI
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. TechCrunch feature 2026-07-19; $400M committed (France $100M seed + Ford/MacArthur/DeepMind/Salesforce), aiming for $2.5B over 5 years.

decisions.title_en: Japan launches FRONTia physical-AI project, ¥1T over 5 years, 27,500 Nvidia Rubin GPUs
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. METI launched FRONTia 2026-07-16 (5 days, within limit). Noetra/SoftBank/Sony/NEC/Honda; sovereign physical-AI model.

decisions.title_en: Etched negotiating back-to-back rounds at $10B and $20B for transformer inference ASIC
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. As of 2026-07-17 Etched in talks for a Jane Street-led $20B round plus a Sequoia-led $10B round; $1B in signed orders.

decisions.title_en: CuspAI raises $450M Series B at $2.6B for AI materials discovery
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. UK materials-discovery startup; Kleiner Perkins, NEA, Bezos fund, AMD Ventures; $2.6B valuation.

decisions.title_en: Bristol Myers Squibb becomes first pharma to buy Nvidia Vera Rubin supercomputer
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. First pharma buyer of Vera Rubin system; claims 20-30% faster drug production.

decisions.title_en: Together AI raises $800M Series C at $8.3B valuation
Oracle cuts ~30,000 jobs to fund Stargate AI data centers
decisions.reason: Underlying layoffs occurred 2026-03-31; July coverage is retrospective analysis, no new event within 5 days.

decisions.title_en: Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic pre-training team
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-05-19 is >5 days old; surfaced in a stale aggregator roundup.

decisions.title_en: NVIDIA releases Cosmos 3 / Isaac GR00T physical-AI models
decisions.reason: Cosmos 3 released 2026-05-31, GR00T reference at GTC Taipei early June; >5 days old.

decisions.title_en: Reports say Google delayed Gemini 3.5 Pro after missing internal targets
decisions.reason: Published 2026-07-17 as 'Gemini 3.5 Pro released'. New coverage claiming a multi-month delay directly contradicts prior reporting; conflicting/unverified, no clean new development to publish.
Already published 2026-07-16 with the $188B valuation. No substantively new information.
